title: [FIRRTL] Assertion Failed Compiling XiangShan
body:
Recently I have been doing work to adapt XiangShan project to CIRCT.
I have encountered the following assertion failed when compiling XiangShan using 

Chisel 3.5.0 
chisel-circt 0.8.0
CIRCT 1.37.0 

The executed command is as follows

```
firtool -format=fir -warn-on-unprocessed-annotations -verify-each=false -dedup -output-annotation-file circt.anno.json --disable-annotation-unknown -annotation-file build/SimTop.anno.json < $input
```
The trace is as follows

```

------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Error: firtool failed.
ExitCode:
134
STDOUT:

STDERR:
firtool: ../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/ModuleInliner.cpp:384: void {anonymous}::MutableNLA::setInnerSym(mlir::Attribute, mlir::StringAttr): Assertion `symIdx.count(module) && "Mutable NLA did not contain symbol"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: firtool -format=fir -warn-on-unprocessed-annotations -verify-each=false -dedup -output-annotation-file circt.anno.json --disable-annotation-unknown -annotation-file build/SimTop.anno.json
 #0 0x0000556f427ebd4f llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) (.localalias) (/nfs/home/manyang/project/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x12fd4f)
 #1 0x0000556f427e9474 SignalHandler(int) (/nfs/home/manyang/project/circt/build/bin/firtool+0x12d474)

 #4 0x00007f5e18913859 abort /build/glibc-sMfBJT/glibc-2.31/stdlib/abort.c:81:7
 #5 0x00007f5e18913729 get_sysdep_segment_value /build/glibc-sMfBJT/glibc-2.31/intl/loadmsgcat.c:509:8
 #6 0x00007f5e18913729 _nl_load_domain /build/glibc-sMfBJT/glibc-2.31/intl/loadmsgcat.c:970:34
 #7 0x00007f5e18925006 (/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libc.so.6+0x34006)
 #8 0x0000556f42c0e75e (anonymous namespace)::MutableNLA::setInnerSym(mlir::Attribute, mlir::StringAttr) /nfs/home/manyang/project/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/ModuleInliner.cpp:384:5
 #9 0x0000556f42c0fcb3 (anonymous namespace)::Inliner::renameInstance(llvm::StringRef, circt::firrtl::InstanceOp, circt::firrtl::InstanceOp, circt::firrtl::ModuleNamespace&, llvm::DenseMap<mlir::Attribute, mlir::Attribute, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Attribute, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Attribute, mlir::Attribute> > const&) /nfs/home/manyang/project/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/ModuleInliner.cpp:730:23

#17 0x0000556f42c11b47 (anonymous namespace)::Inliner::inlineInto(llvm::StringRef, mlir::OpBuilder&, mlir::IRMapping&, circt::BackedgeBuilder&, llvm::SmallVectorImpl<circt::Backedge>&, circt::firrtl::FModuleOp, llvm::DenseMap<mlir::Attribute, mlir::Attribute, llvm::DenseMapInfo<mlir::Attribute, void>, llvm::detail::DenseMapPair<mlir::Attribute, mlir::Attribute> >&, circt::firrtl::ModuleNamespace&) /nfs/home/manyang/project/circt/build/../lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/ModuleInliner.cpp:1031:21
```

The input file SimTop.anno.json is as follows
[SimTop.anno.txt](https://github.com/llvm/circt/files/11128733/SimTop.anno.txt)

Related Issue from XiangShan: OpenXiangShan/XiangShan#1992
